arabic_text: إِنَّا أَعْطَيْنَاكَ الْكَوْثَرَ ﴿١﴾ فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانْحَرْ ﴿٢﴾ إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ الْأَبْتَرُ ﴿٣﴾
alt_text: Sura al-Kawthar (Q108) three verses with arrows: verse 2 ('فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانْحَرْ') as the central pivot, verses 1 and 3 (Allah's gift / enemy cut off) as the chiastic pair.
notes: Sura al-Kawthar chiastic structure with verse 2 as pivot.
